description: You are a research scientist building a pure-Python text search engine library for IETF RFC documents. Implement the core logic in the 'engine/' package of the 'search_engine' project to ensure all 26 tests in the 'tests/' directory pass. This involves implementing text normalization and stopword removal in tokenizer.py, an inverted index in indexer.py, TF-IDF scoring in scorer.py, boolean query parsing (AND/OR/NOT) in query.py, and the high-level search API in searcher.py. Use only the Python standard library; external libraries are prohibited. Do not modify the files in 'tests/' or the data in 'data/corpus.json'.
